subcodes.first_line: The Book hath descended from the heaven of God's Will, adorned with this Name whereby all things were thrown into consternation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل من سماء مشیه الله و زین دیباجه بهذا الاسم الذی به حدث الاضطراب فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @chastisement and requital
